backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ASTROMANIA backend, combining blob storage and authorization mixins to expose CRUD endpoints for gemstones, reviews, cart, booking requests, contact submissions, gallery, social media links, and user profiles with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two completed features—removing the Numerology service entry and removing price/pricing display from the Services page—to their affected file and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the current state and purpose of every page and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'ASTROMANIA by Vijay Sawkar' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider (dark default) and React Query, and renders the shared Header/Footer layout.
Reusable React component that renders an HTML/CSS replica of Vastu Shikhar certificates for either 'astrology' or 'vastu' types, complete with gold border framing, corner decorations, and watermark styling.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: FAQ section component rendering five accordion items covering Kundali accuracy, Vastu corrections, gemstone selection, gemstone effectiveness, and online consultations, styled with the cosmic dark theme.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social media links, quick navigation links, services list, and contact details including a Google Maps URL.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation links, and an Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, gemstones, reviews, and cart management via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS including Google Fonts imports, Tailwind directives, a dark cosmic color theme using CSS custom properties, and keyframe animations for cosmic UI effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page for astrologer Vijay Sawkar, displaying a hero section, biography with photo, stats, credentials grid, and expertise areas using static data arrays.
frontend/src/pages/BookConsultation.tsx: Provides a consultation booking form with fields for name, contact, date, consultation type, and mode, submitting the request via a React Query mutation and showing a success confirmation screen.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Renders the Contact page with a contact form, office info, social links, and an admin-only media gallery with upload and delete functionality backed by the ICP actor.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Displays a filterable media gallery combining static photos and certificates with backend-uploaded images and videos, supporting admin upload/delete and a lightbox viewer.
frontend/src/pages/GemstoneShop.tsx: Renders a gemstone shop page listing nine Vedic gemstones with details, benefits, and weight options, allowing users to view a detail modal and initiate a WhatsApp order inquiry.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page for Vijay Sawkar's astrology website featuring a hero section, services grid, stats, and testimonials with links to booking.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page listing Vedic Astrology, Vastu, Gemstone Therapy, Kundali, and other offerings with details, file upload support, and ICP Internet Identity integration.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Displays a grid of eight client testimonials with star ratings, service tags, and locations for the ASTROMANIA astrology site.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a cosmic-themed design system with custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond), an oklch-based color palette, shadows, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for ASTROMANIA, recording two pending feature requests: removing the Numerology service and hiding pricing from all service listings.
